title: The Appropriation (Railways) Act, 1979
description: An Act to authorise expenditure of certain sums in respect of Bangladesh Railways from and out of the Consolidated Fund for the services of the financial year ending on the thirtieth day of June, 1980. WHEREAS it is expedient to authorise expenditure of certain sums in respect of Bangladesh Railways from and out of the Consolidated Fund for the services of the financial year ending on the thirtieth day of June, 19...

provisions.title: 1. Short title
provisions.content: 1. This Act may be called the Appropriation (Railways) Act, 1979 .

provisions.title: 2. Issue of Taka 219,38,87,000 out of the Consolidated Fund for the year 1979-80
provisions.content: 2. There may be paid and applied from and out of the Consolidated Fund sums not exceeding those specified in column 3 of the Schedule amounting in the aggregate to the sum of Taka two hundred nineteen crores, thirty-eight lakhs and eighty-seven thousand towards defraying the several charges which will come in course of payment during the financial year ending on the thirtieth day of June, 1980 in respect of the services and purposes specified in column 2 of the Schedule.

provisions.title: 3. Appropriation
provisions.content: 3. The sums authorised to be paid and applied from and out of the Consolidated Fund by this Act shall be appropriated for the services and purposes expressed in the Schedule in relation to the financial year ending on the thirtieth day of June, 1980.
